title: Robust Roasted Brazilian Chicken Bake
description: A pungent and flavorful Brazilian dish featuring tamarind pulp, perfect for a special occasion, this recipe is low in fat and packed with protein.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender, combine tamarind pulp, olive oil, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, salt, black pepper, and brown sugar, and blend until smooth.
Place the chicken thighs in a large bowl and brush the tamarind mixture evenly over both sides of the chicken.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and place it on the preheated binchotan grill.
Close the grill lid and roast the chicken for 30 minutes.
After 30 minutes, reduce the heat to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and continue roasting for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the grill and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with fresh cilantro and lime wedges.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
